input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.2.1
            TITLE: the organizer may specify restrictions for the dynamic area.  these could include limiting the

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.2.1: The organizer may specify restrictions for the Dynamic Area.  These could include limiting the
D.3.2.1 The organizer may specify restrictions for the Dynamic Area.  These could include limiting the 
number of team members and what may be brought into the area.

final_answer: The organizer may specify restrictions for the Dynamic Area. These could include limiting the number of team members and what may be brought into the area.
